review: These lavender candles are lovely — clean burn and a soft scent that fills the room without being overpowering. Shipped quickly from Hartford. Will reorder.
The speckled glaze mug is even prettier in person. Good weight, holds heat well, and the handle is comfortable. Beautifully packed.
Gorgeous maple cutting board. Smooth finish, no rough edges, and it smells faintly of the oil finish. Perfect housewarming gift.
Pretty hand-printed tea towel. Print is crisp and the linen is sturdy. Took off one star only because it was a touch smaller than I expected, but I'm happy with it.
Ordered a personalized leather bookmark and it turned out perfect. The stamping is clean and the leather feels great. Lovely little gift.
The pressed flower frame is delicate and charming. Arrived safely with extra padding. Wish the frame were a little deeper but it looks great on the shelf.
Super soft merino beanie that actually keeps my ears warm through a Hartford winter. The knit is even and tight. Very happy.
Nice hand-bound A5 notebook with sturdy covers and smooth paper. Binding feels solid. A lovely small gift — would buy again.
